Notes: Single UPDATE deletes the zone apex by name, which implicates SOA and NS at the apex. Follow-up queries observe whether the server refuses the update or accepts it and alters apex state.

Steps.Description: Delete the zone apex name campus.edu. with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the apex SOA remains, is regenerated, or is absent after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the apex NS remains, is regenerated, or is absent after the UPDATE.
